stemHtml:
It is generally known that smoking cigarettes can cause an early onset of hypoxia. But there are other possible causes for this phenomenon. What are they?

1. Alcohol
2. Caffeine
3. Nutrition
4. Carbon monoxide poisoning
5. Scuba diving
6. Hypertension
7. Heartburn
8. Iron deficiency
9. Steep descents
10. Heart insufficiency
11. Obesity
12. Use of narcotics
